calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and Declaration in support of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Shadowoods Towing, Inc., and Thomas Tignanelli as follows:
Principal $28,381.54
Prejudgment Interest $582.75
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $370.50, for a total of $31,834.79
Judgment signed in open court.
